zh.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook是Thomas Cooke和Susan Cousins的女兒，於大約1775年出生在美國北卡羅來納州。她於1799年2月27日與Hardeman Hughes在美國田納西州葛人傑結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1835年在美國田納西州漢密爾頓享年61歲，埋葬在美國田納西州漢密爾頓塞爾 可可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook是Thomas Cooke和Susan Cousins的女儿，于大约1775年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州。她于1799年2月27日与Hardeman Hughes在美国田纳西州葛人傑结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1835年在美国田纳西州漢密爾頓享年61岁，埋葬在美国田纳西州漢密爾頓塞爾 可可。

nameMeanings.name: Cook
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

variants.name: Cookson
meanings: English (Lancashire): from Middle English cok ‘cook’ or the surname Cook + son, denoting either ‘son of (the) cook’ or ‘son of (a man called) Cook’. See Cook .

variants.name: Cocke
meanings: nickname from Middle English cok (Old English and Old French coc) ‘rooster’.
patronymic from the Old French and Middle English personal name Cok, of uncertain origin but perhaps derived from the word in 1 above.

variants.name: Coke
meanings: English: variant of   Cook   or   Cocke  .
Americanized form of German   Koke   or   Koch  .

variants.name: Kuhar
meanings: Slovenian and Croatian: occupational name for a cook, from kuhar, a derivative of kuhati ‘to cook’. Compare Cook .
Americanized form of Slovak Kuchár ‘cook’ (see Kuchar ) and of its Ukrainian and Rusyn cognate Kukhar.

variants.name: Cooke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Kew
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French queu, keu, kieu, cu ‘cook’, i.e. one who sold cooked meat, keeper of an eating house.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Caieu, a lost town in northern France, in the vicinity of Boulogne-sur-Mer.
Irish: shortened Ulster variant of   McHugh  .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: Capital City Moved
historicEvents.description: New Bern had been the capital of North Carolina in its early days. In 1792, the capital was moved to Raleigh because it was more the center of the state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: National Park Service- Raleigh: A Capital City

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Financial Relief for Public Land
historicEvents.description: A United States law to provide financial relief for the purchasers of Public Lands. It permitted the earlier buyers, that couldn't pay completely for the land, to return the land back to the government. This granted them a credit towards the debt they had on land. Congress, also, extended credit to buyer for eight more years. Still while being in economic panic and the shortage of currency made by citizens, the government hoped that with the time extension, the economy would improve.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

en.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook was born about 1775, in North Carolina, United States as the daughter of Thomas Cooke and Susan Cousins. She married Hardeman Hughes on 27 February 1799, in Grainger, Tennessee, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1835, in Hamilton, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 61, and was buried in Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook est née environ 1775, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, fille de Thomas Cooke et Susan Cousins. Elle a épousé Hardeman Hughes le 27 février 1799, à Grainger, Tennessee, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1835, à Hamilton, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, États-Unis.

de.Shipley Cem, Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tenne: Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook wurde um 1775 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten, als Tochter von Thomas Cooke und Susan Cousins geboren. Sie hat am 27. Februar 1799 in Grainger, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten Hardeman Hughes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1835 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hamilton, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook è nata il circa 1775 nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America come figlia di Thomas Cooke e Susan Cousins. Lei sposato Hardeman Hughes il 27 febbraio 1799, nel Grainger, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1835, nel Hamilton, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cookは約1775年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州でThomas CookeとSusan Cousinsの娘として生まれた。1799年2月27日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州グレインジャーでHardeman Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1835年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ハミルトンで61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国テネシー州ハミルトンサル クレエクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook(은)는 대략 1775년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Thomas Cooke(와)과 Susan Cousins의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1799년 2월 27일 미국 테네시 주 그레이그거에서 Hardeman Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1835년 미국 테네시 주 함이턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 테네시 주 함이턴 살일 크리크에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Hardeman Hughes em 27 de fevereiro de 1799, em Grainger, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.Shipley Cem, Sale Creek, Hamilton, Tenne: сеил крик, хамилтон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Sinthia Cook родилась около 1775 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. Её родителей звали Thomas Cooke и Susan Cousins. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hardeman Hughes 27 февраля 1799 г. в местности греингир, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1835 г. в местности хамилтон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности сеил крик, хамилтон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты.
